race.description: North West Ag Quambatook Cup Hcp (Bm56)
race.comment: JUST LIKE LISA (9) ran a strong race first up at Balaklava then went to town last time and could only manage ninth over 1100m at Morphettville. Well placed to make amends now at peak fitness. FREDERICK (1) resumed two weeks ago over 1109m at Echuca and was only beaten 1.5 lengths into fourth. Draws terribly, but fitter so anticipating a better run this time. SWEET 'N' SPICY (11) is also second-up, returning from a spell two weeks ago when she was prominent at the bend before being beaten 2.5 lengths into fourth over 1109m at Echuca, but she does draw well so warrants respect. BLONDIE'S TORONADO (10) has not won for a long while, but was beaten only 2 lengths into sixth at Mornington over 1200m last time out in what was probably a stronger race. The big problem for her is she has to overcome the outside alley. TESTA DEXTA (3) is first-up for a couple of months, when he enhanced his fresh record, so he needs consideration from the inside gate.
